summary.shape_sentence: Early push into upper supply failed, price flushed into midday demand, bounced hard off the low, then faded and closed in the lower half.

goat.note: Bullish rebound from the noon demand flush near 24340-24360 back into the 24480-24500 area.

red_circles.behavior: Clustered on rebound failures and lower highs, repeatedly confirming short pivots beneath overhead resistance.

green_circles.behavior: Concentrated near washout lows and reclaim spots, most effective around the noon reversal attempt.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Primary supply sat around 24490-24540 with secondary resistance near 24430-24460; rallies into those zones were respected and rejected.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand first appeared near 24380-24400 and more strongly at 24290-24340; the deeper pocket held, while the mid-band gave way intraday.

time_markers.10am_blue: Opening strength had already rolled over; price was trading heavy near lower-half demand and trying to stabilize.
time_markers.12pm_red: Market was in its weakest phase, flushing into the session low zone and beginning a bullish reversal attempt.
time_markers.2pm_green: The lunch rebound had pushed back upward, but price was stalling near mid/upper resistance and setting up another fade.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Session ended near 24368 after late stabilization, below the open and in the lower half of the day's range.

takeaway: Bearish rotational day with opening rejection, noon demand flush, and a failed lunch rebound that never converted into a true afternoon trend reversal.
